Low.possible_indication: Possible anemia or blood deficiency risk
Low.english_explanation: Low hemoglobin may indicate anemia or blood deficiency.
Low.roman_urdu_explanation: Hemoglobin kam hai, yeh khoon ki kami ya anemia ke risk ki taraf ishara kar sakta hai.
Low.doctor_advice: Consult a qualified doctor for confirmation.

High.english_explanation: Elevated Troponin is a sensitive marker for possible cardiac injury.
High.roman_urdu_explanation: Troponin normal se zyada hai, yeh dil mein injury ya strain ki taraf ishara ho sakta hai.
High.doctor_advice: Urgent doctor review is highly recommended.

High.english_explanation: High creatinine may indicate that kidneys are not filtering waste optimally.
High.roman_urdu_explanation: Creatinine normal se zyada hai, yeh gurdon (kidneys) ki karkardagi mein kami ka ishara ho sakta hai.
